title: calamintha rotundifolia
intro: Calamintha rotundifolia, also known as round-leaved calamintha or round-leaved basil, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Calamintha rotundifolia include relief from digestive issues, such as nausea and indigestion, as well as its ability to reduce stress and anxiety. Calamintha rotundifolia can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
